Fixed. Here's what was wrong and what was done:

**Root cause:** The clungiverse game client (`main.js`) was missing from `/mnt/data/hello-world/static/clungiverse/`. The HTML page loaded fine (200), but the browser would immediately fail to load the 1.2MB game bundle, leaving users with a blank canvas.

**Why it was missing:** The build script at `/mnt/data/clungiverse-client-v2/build.sh` compiles `src/main.ts` → `static/clungiverse/main.js` using Bun. It had never been run (or the output was l...(truncated)
